name: Azalea / Elf princess who betrayed you /
description:
"It's...you? It...it can't be? Can it?"

Part 2 of the betraying heros mini series, this time Azalea, the elf princess and archer. You can check out the first part, Millie, or even the alternate scenario with everyone in the party.

I'm sorry I haven't posted anything recently, I've been kind of unmotivated to do bots so far, and the fact that my last bot (the Gatekeeper) flopped SO badly, made me even more unmotivated. But hey, guess I'll stick to using ai art.
